name: Jess Hansen Golf Academy
address: 19310 E 50th Terrace Suite N, Independence, MO 64055
about: Jess Hansen Golf Academy is a premier golf training facility located within the APEX Sports Complex. The academy offers a comprehensive suite of golf improvement services including private instruction, group classes, and technology-enhanced practice sessions using TrackMan launch monitors and SAM PuttLab systems. Their core offerings feature a Golf School Crash Course, private lessons for all skill levels, and specialized junior programs, all designed to provide a structured pathway for skill development. The facility emphasizes data-driven improvement with pro video analysis, club fitting, and personalized practice plans.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium TrackMan and SAM PuttLab technology for detailed swing analysis
PGA-certified professional instruction with a focus on personalized practice plans
Flexible options ranging from private lessons to group classes and home simulator sales

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site food or drink services mentioned.

simulator_hardware.notes: Five range bays equipped with TrackMan technology for launch monitor services and golf simulations.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The academy provides all necessary equipment for lessons and practice sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No on-site food or drink services are mentioned; BYOB is not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18-hole play time is not specified, as the focus is on practice and lessons rather than full course simulation.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Jess Hansen Golf Academy offers dedicated junior programs including Beginner and Elite Summer Camps for young golfers.
